activities.name: AlertsByDataverseAOP
activities.description: Load AlertLogs, if user create items, for workspace that has dataverse setting as AOP off and create items that are not allowed for such workspace.

typeProperties.subject: [Fabric] Workspace Monitoring Notification
typeProperties.body:
@concat( '
', '

This notification is sent as part of Fabric Workspace Monitoring. Learn more

', '

Dear Workspace Owner,

', '

Fabric Workspace Monitoring detected following artifacts and is in process of deletion, as they were not allowed in your workspace ', item().WorkspaceId, '. As mentioned in article link.

', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', item().HtmlRows, '
Workspace IDItem IDItem TypeCreator IDCreated At
', '

To learn more about Fabric, visit goto/powerhub.

', '

For more information about constraints and limitations, visit Power Platform constraints or Power BI constraints.

', '

Best regards,
', 'UBS BizApps Team
', 'Group Functions

', '
', '

', 'Please do not reply to this automatically generated email as the mailbox is not monitored.
', '© UBS ', utcNow('yyyy'), '. For internal use only.', '

', '
' )

query.value: @concat('let latestWorkspaceEmail = workspace_owner | where isnotempty(trim(" ", PrimaryEmail)) or isnotempty(trim(" ", SecondaryEmail)) | extend emails = strcat(PrimaryEmail, ";", SecondaryEmail) | summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), emails) by workspaceId | project emails, workspaceId; AlertLogs | where ingestion_time() > todatetime("', variables('now'), '") | extend IngestionTime = ingestion_time() | summarize arg_max(IngestionTime, *) by WorkspaceId, data_itemId | join kind=inner (latestWorkspaceEmail) on $left.WorkspaceId == $right.workspaceId | project WorkspaceId, emails, data_itemId, htmlRow = strcat( '''', '''' , WorkspaceId, '''', '''', data_itemId, '''', '''', data_itemKind, '''', '''', UserId, '''', '''', format_datetime(wstime, ''yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm''), '''', '''' ) | summarize HtmlRows = strcat_array(make_list(htmlRow), ''''), ItemIds = strcat_array(make_list(data_itemId),", ") by WorkspaceId, emails')

activities.name: AlertsIfDisableAOP
activities.description: Load AlertLogs, if user disable manually AOP Workspace setting and create items. This logic will delete items even if AOP was disabled for a very short amount of time

command.value:
@concat('.append AlertLogs <| 
let lastRunParam = toscalar(MonitoringLastRunTime | summarize max(LastRunTime));
let startTimeFilter = case(isnull(lastRunParam), ago(100d), lastRunParam > ago(1h), ago(1h), lastRunParam);
let ak = AllowedItemKind;
let wl = WorkspaceLogs
| where ingestion_time() > startTimeFilter
| where ingestion_time() < todatetime("', variables('now'),'")
| extend IngestionTime = ingestion_time()
| where type == "Microsoft.Fabric.ItemCreateSucceeded"
| project WorkspaceName = data_workspaceName, data_workspaceId, wstime = ["time"], data_itemName, data_itemId, data_itemKind, type, IngestionTime, UserId = data_executingPrincipalId;
let daop =
DataverseWorkspace
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), OAPActivity, IsMonitored) by WorkspaceId
| where OAPActivity == "EnableWorkspaceOutboundAccessProtection"
| where IsMonitored == true
| project WorkspaceId;
let aop =
WorkspaceOutboundAccessProtection
| extend IngestionTime = ingestion_time()
| order by WorkspaceId, CreationTime asc
| serialize 
| extend NextCreationTime = next(CreationTime)
| extend NextActivity = next(Activity)
| extend NextWorkspaceId = next(WorkspaceId)
| extend endTime = iff(WorkspaceId == NextWorkspaceId and Activity != NextActivity, NextCreationTime, datetime(2999-01-01))
| where Activity == "DisableWorkspaceOutboundAccessProtection"
| project WorkspaceId, startTime = CreationTime, endTime;
wl
| join kind = inner 
    daop
    on $left.data_workspaceId == $right.WorkspaceId
| join kind = inner 
    aop
    on  $left.data_workspaceId == $right.WorkspaceId
| join kind = leftanti 
    ak
    on $left.data_itemKind == $right.ItemKind
| where wstime > startTime and wstime <= endTime
| extend AlertStatus = "Initial"
| project WorkspaceName, WorkspaceId, wstime, data_itemKind, data_itemName, data_itemId, AlertStatus, UserId
// 3. Filter out records that already exist in the destination table
| join kind=leftanti (
    AlertLogs 
) on WorkspaceId, data_itemId')

activities.name: AlertsWhenAOPShouldBeEnabled
activities.description: Load AlertLogs table, if Dataverse AOP is AOP enabled and Fabric logs show it is Disabled - > then we need to log for more item kinds

command.value:
@concat('.append AlertLogs <| 
let lastRunParam = toscalar(MonitoringLastRunTime | summarize max(LastRunTime));
let startTimeFilter = case(isnull(lastRunParam), ago(100d), lastRunParam > ago(1h), ago(1h), lastRunParam);
let ak = AllowedAOPItemKind;
let wl = WorkspaceLogs
| where ingestion_time() > startTimeFilter
| where ingestion_time() < todatetime("', variables('now'),'")
| extend IngestionTime = ingestion_time()
| where type == "Microsoft.Fabric.ItemCreateSucceeded"
| project WorkspaceName = data_workspaceName, data_workspaceId, wstime = ["time"], data_itemName, data_itemId, data_itemKind, type, IngestionTime;
let aop =
WorkspaceOutboundAccessProtection
| summarize arg_max(CreationTime, Activity) by WorkspaceId
| where Activity == "DisableWorkspaceOutboundAccessProtection"
| project WorkspaceId;
let daop =
DataverseWorkspace
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), OAPActivity, IsMonitored) by WorkspaceId
| where IsMonitored == true
| where OAPActivity == "EnableWorkspaceOutboundAccessProtection"
| project WorkspaceId;
wl
| join kind = inner 
    aop
    on  $left.data_workspaceId == $right.WorkspaceId
| join kind = inner 
    daop
    on  $left.data_workspaceId == $right.WorkspaceId
| join kind = leftanti 
    ak
    on $left.data_itemKind == $right.ItemKind
| project WorkspaceName, WorkspaceId, wstime, data_itemKind, data_itemName, data_itemId
| extend AlertStatus = "Initial"
// 3. Filter out records that already exist in the destination table
| join kind=leftanti (
    AlertLogs 
) on WorkspaceId, data_itemId')

activities.name: AOPChangeAlertLog
activities.description: Add to AOPAlertLogs that capacity was changed and if it needs to be switched back to original setting

typeProperties.subject: [Fabric] Workspace Monitoring Notification
typeProperties.body:
@concat( '
', '

This notification is sent as part of Fabric Workspace Monitoring. Learn more

', '

Dear Workspace Owner,

', '

Fabric Workspace Monitoring detected Outbound Access Protection change in your WorkspaceId ', item().WorkspaceId, ' , which is not allowed as mentioned in article link.

', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', item().HtmlRows, '
Workspace IDBaseline OAP SettingDetected ChangeCreator IDCreated At
', '

To learn more about Fabric, visit goto/powerhub.

', '

For more information about constraints and limitations, visit Power Platform constraints or Power BI constraints.

', '

Best regards,
', 'UBS BizApps Team
', 'Group Functions

', '
', '

', 'Please do not reply to this automatically generated email as the mailbox is not monitored.
', '© UBS ', utcNow('yyyy'), '. For internal use only.', '

', '
' )

query.value: @concat('let latestWorkspaceEmail = workspace_owner | where isnotempty( trim(" ", PrimaryEmail)) or isnotempty( trim(" ", SecondaryEmail)) | extend emails = strcat(PrimaryEmail,";",SecondaryEmail) | summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), emails) by workspaceId | project emails, workspaceId; AOPAlertLogs | where ingestion_time() > todatetime("', variables('now'), '") | extend IngestionTime = ingestion_time() | summarize arg_max(CreationTime, UserId, AlertStatus, Id, AOPMustBe, AOP, UserKey) by WorkspaceId, Id | where AlertStatus == "Initial" | join kind=inner ( latestWorkspaceEmail ) on $left.WorkspaceId == $right.workspaceId | project WorkspaceId, emails, Id, htmlRow = strcat( '''', '''' , WorkspaceId, '''', '''', AOPMustBe, '''', '''', AOP, '''', '''', UserKey, '''', '''', format_datetime(CreationTime, ''yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm''), '''', '''' ) | summarize HtmlRows = strcat_array(make_list(htmlRow), ''''), Ids = strcat_array(make_list(Id),", ") by WorkspaceId, emails')

activities.name: Set No Email
activities.description: set alert status to no email if there is no email

command.value:
@concat('.set-or-append  AlertLogs <|
let validOwners = 
workspace_owner
| where isnotempty( trim(" ", PrimaryEmail)) or isnotempty( trim(" ", SecondaryEmail))
| extend emails = strcat(PrimaryEmail,";",SecondaryEmail)
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), emails) by workspaceId
| project emails, workspaceId;
AlertLogs
| where ingestion_time() > todatetime("', variables('now'),'")
| extend IngestionTime = ingestion_time()
| summarize  arg_max(IngestionTime,*) by WorkspaceId, data_itemId
| where AlertStatus == "Initial"
| join kind=leftanti (
    validOwners
) on $left.WorkspaceId == $right.workspaceId
| project WorkspaceName, WorkspaceId, wstime, data_itemKind, data_itemName, data_itemId, AlertStatus = "NoEmail", UserId')

activities.name: Set AOP No Email
activities.description: if workspace does not have emails assigned we set it to no email

command.value:
@concat('.append AOPAlertLogs <|
let latestWorkspaceEmail = 
workspace_owner
| where isnotempty( trim(" ", PrimaryEmail)) or isnotempty( trim(" ", SecondaryEmail))
| extend emails = strcat(PrimaryEmail,";",SecondaryEmail)
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), emails) by workspaceId
| project emails, workspaceId;
AOPAlertLogs
| where ingestion_time() > todatetime("', variables('now'), '")
| extend IngestionTime = ingestion_time()
| summarize arg_max(IngestionTime,*) by WorkspaceId, Id
| where AlertStatus == "Initial"
| join kind=leftanti (
    latestWorkspaceEmail
) on $left.WorkspaceId == $right.workspaceId
| project WorkspaceId, ToChangeAOP, AOP, AOPMustBe, CreationTime, UserId, AlertStatus = "NoEmail", Id, UserKey')
